---
title: "weir_design_data_handle"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# ── 先建立 lishan_daily_clean.csv ────────────────────────────
daily_raw <- read_csv(here("data", "lishan_daily.csv"),
                      show_col_types = FALSE)

daily_clean <- daily_raw |>
  arrange(date) |>
  mutate(
    flag = case_when(
      is.na(Q_cms)   ~ "missing",
      Q_cms < 0      ~ "negative",
      Q_cms > 1500   ~ "extreme_high",
      TRUE           ~ "ok"
    ),
    # Linear interpolation for gaps <= 7 days
    Q_filled = zoo::na.approx(
      if_else(flag == "ok", Q_cms, NA_real_),
      maxgap = 7, na.rm = FALSE
    ),
    # Rolling median fallback for long gaps
    Q_roll = zoo::rollapply(
      Q_filled, width = 30, FUN = median,
      na.rm = TRUE, fill = NA, align = "center"
    ),
    Q_filled = if_else(is.na(Q_filled) & !is.na(Q_roll),
                       Q_roll, Q_filled),
    # Final fallback: overall median
    Q_filled = if_else(is.na(Q_filled),
                       median(Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE),
                       Q_filled),
    was_filled = flag == "missing"
  ) |>
  rename(Q_cms_raw = Q_cms, Q_cms = Q_filled) |>
  select(date, Q_cms_raw, Q_cms, was_filled, flag)

cat("daily_clean built:", nrow(daily_clean), "rows\n")
cat("Still NA:", sum(is.na(daily_clean$Q_cms)), "\n")

write_csv(daily_clean, here("data", "lishan_daily_clean.csv"))
cat("Saved: lishan_daily_clean.csv\n\n")

# ── 現在重跑 cross-validation ─────────────────────────────────
cross_check <- sed_with_date |>
  filter(flag %in% c("ok", "typo_corrected", "ssl_inconsistent")) |>
  left_join(
    daily_clean |> select(date, Q_daily = Q_cms, Q_raw = Q_cms_raw),
    by = c("date_full" = "date")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Q_diff_pct = if_else(
      !is.na(Q_raw) & Q_raw > 0,
      (Discharge_CMS - Q_raw) / Q_raw * 100,
      NA_real_
    ),
    matched = !is.na(Q_raw)
  )

cat("=== Cross-validation summary ===\n")
cat("Sediment obs used            :", nrow(cross_check), "\n")
cat("Matched to daily record      :", sum(cross_check$matched), "\n")
cat("No match in daily record     :", sum(!cross_check$matched), "\n\n")

cat("=== Q difference (sediment vs daily raw) ===\n")
cross_check |>
  filter(matched) |>
  summarise(
    n               = n(),
    mean_diff_pct   = round(mean(Q_diff_pct, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_diff_pct = round(median(Q_diff_pct, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    sd_diff_pct     = round(sd(Q_diff_pct, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    within_10pct    = round(mean(abs(Q_diff_pct) < 10,  na.rm = TRUE)*100, 1),
    within_30pct    = round(mean(abs(Q_diff_pct) < 30,  na.rm = TRUE)*100, 1)
  ) |>
  print()

cat("\n=== Largest discrepancies (|diff| > 50%) ===\n")
cross_check |>
  filter(matched, abs(Q_diff_pct) > 50) |>
  select(date_full, year, month,
         Q_sed = Discharge_CMS, Q_raw, Q_diff_pct, flag) |>
  arrange(desc(abs(Q_diff_pct))) |>
  print(n = 20)

cat("\n=== Unmatched years ===\n")
cross_check |>
  filter(!matched) |>
  count(year) |>
  print(n = Inf)
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
